edge_functions.name: admin-update-seller-restriction
edge_functions.purpose: Admin endpoint to update seller restriction status (restrict/unrestrict)

edge_functions.name: chatbot-proxy
edge_functions.purpose: Proxy chatbot requests to AI provider (OpenAI) for seller storefront/personal assistants

edge_functions.name: check-consent
edge_functions.purpose: Check user email consent status for CASL compliance

edge_functions.name: create-checkout-session
edge_functions.purpose: Create Stripe Checkout session for cart items

edge_functions.name: create-connect-account
edge_functions.purpose: Create Stripe Connect account for seller onboarding

edge_functions.name: create-order
edge_functions.purpose: Create order record in database

edge_functions.name: create-wf10-test-user
edge_functions.purpose: Create test user for WF-10 email reply testing

edge_functions.name: get-connect-status
edge_functions.purpose: Check Stripe Connect account onboarding status for seller

edge_functions.name: get-deadline-orders
edge_functions.purpose: Fetch orders approaching shipping deadlines for notification workflows

edge_functions.name: get-order-confirmation
edge_functions.purpose: Fetch order details for confirmation page (with polling for Stripe webhook)

edge_functions.name: get-order-notification-data
edge_functions.purpose: Fetch full order + items + seller data for email notification workflows

edge_functions.name: get-order-sellers
edge_functions.purpose: Get distinct seller IDs for an order (multi-seller support)

edge_functions.name: get-unsynced-comms
edge_functions.purpose: Fetch communication logs not yet synced to Pinecone for knowledge base

edge_functions.name: get-wf9-order
edge_functions.purpose: Fetch order data for WF-9 Stripe→email workflow (n8n)

edge_functions.name: get-wf9-order-items
edge_functions.purpose: Fetch order items for WF-9 email workflow

edge_functions.name: log-chat-message
edge_functions.purpose: Log chatbot messages to chat_messages table (service role bypass RLS)

edge_functions.name: log-communication
edge_functions.purpose: Log outbound/inbound email to communication_logs table

edge_functions.name: log-email-consent
edge_functions.purpose: Record email consent per CASL to email_consent_log

edge_functions.name: mark-kb-synced
edge_functions.purpose: Mark knowledge base entries as synced to Pinecone

edge_functions.name: n8n-proxy
edge_functions.purpose: Proxy requests to n8n webhooks (avoids CORS, hides n8n URL)

edge_functions.name: notify-seller-approval
edge_functions.purpose: Notify n8n when seller is approved (triggers approval email)

edge_functions.name: notify-seller-registration
edge_functions.purpose: Notify n8n when new seller registers (triggers welcome email)

edge_functions.name: process-seller-transfers
edge_functions.purpose: Process Stripe Connect transfers to sellers after delivery confirmation

edge_functions.name: save-marketing-consent
edge_functions.purpose: Save marketing consent record (CASL compliant) from chatbot gate

edge_functions.name: seed-wf10-test-data
edge_functions.purpose: Seed test data for WF-10 inbound email testing

edge_functions.name: send-verification-otp
edge_functions.purpose: Send OTP verification code to email (pre-registration verification)

edge_functions.name: simulate-inbound-email
edge_functions.purpose: Simulate Mailgun inbound email for WF-10 testing

edge_functions.name: stripe-webhook
edge_functions.purpose: Handle Stripe webhook events (checkout.session.completed, etc.)

edge_functions.name: stripe-webhook-test
edge_functions.purpose: Test Stripe webhook processing with mock payloads

edge_functions.name: submit-cabinet-match
edge_functions.purpose: Submit cabinet dimension match request (client→product matching)

edge_functions.name: test-integration
edge_functions.purpose: Test third-party integration connectivity (health check)

edge_functions.name: update-communication-status
edge_functions.purpose: Update email delivery status from Mailgun events (WF-11)

edge_functions.name: update-order-status
edge_functions.purpose: Update order status with timestamp tracking (shipped, delivered, etc.)

edge_functions.name: verify-otp-code
edge_functions.purpose: Verify OTP code submitted by user during registration

email_workflows.WF-8: Email Dispatcher — sends outbound emails via Mailgun, logs to communication_logs
email_workflows.WF-9: Stripe Email Router — Stripe webhook events → email notifications
email_workflows.WF-10: Inbound Email Handler — processes inbound customer replies via Mailgun
email_workflows.WF-11: Mailgun Event Receiver — processes delivery/bounce/open/click events
